_meta.description: MobSF manifest-level baseline findings for InsecureBankv2. Deliberately vulnerable Android banking app used for security training.

mobsf_findings.description: android:debuggable=true allows attaching a debugger to the process.

mobsf_findings.issue_title: Application Data can be Backed Up
mobsf_findings.description: android:allowBackup=true allows application data to be backed up via adb.

mobsf_findings.issue_title: Clear Text Traffic Is Enabled For App
mobsf_findings.description: Application allows cleartext HTTP traffic. targetSdkVersion=15 (< 28), so cleartext is allowed by default.

mobsf_findings.issue_title: App can be installed on a vulnerable older version of android
mobsf_findings.description: minSdkVersion 15 (Android 4.0.3 ICS) is critically outdated (< API 19/KitKat).
Multiple activities, services, and receivers are exported without permission protection. InsecureBankv2 has 8 activities, 1 service, and 1 receiver all exported with no permission requirement.
mobsf_findings.evidence_pattern: 8 exported activities, 1 exported service, 1 exported receiver

mobsf_findings.description: ViewStatement activity handles browsable http://mybank.com deep link without autoVerify, enabling potential link hijacking.
Application requests multiple dangerous permissions: READ_PHONE_STATE, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION, SEND_SMS, READ_CONTACTS, READ_CALL_LOG.

summary.notes: MobSF reports 6-8 manifest-level findings for InsecureBankv2. Our scanner should match all core findings (MANIFEST-001/002/003/005/006/010) plus may include MANIFEST-016 (dangerous permissions). Total should be 5-12.
